data.name: Attribute
data.value: Attribute

data.name: AttributeEnumValue
data.value: Attribute Enum Value

data.name: Attribute.AttributeEntity.Invalid
data.value: Attribute entity is invalid.

data.name: Attribute.Code.Duplicate
data.value: Attribute code already exists.

data.name: Attribute.Code.NotEmpty
data.value: Attribute code could not be empty.

data.name: Attribute.Code.Numeric
data.value: Attribute code must be numeric.

data.name: Attribute.DataType.EnumHasValues
data.value: Attribute data type cannot be changed from enum because enum values are attached to it.

data.name: Attribute.DataType.Invalid
data.value: Attribute data type is invalid.

data.name: Attribute.Delete.HasEnumValues
data.value: Attribute cannot be deleted because enum values are attached to it.

data.name: Attribute.Delete.IsStatic
data.value: Static attribute cannot be deleted.

data.name: Attribute.Title.MaxLength
data.value: Attribute title must not be longer than 50 characters.

data.name: Attribute.Title.MinLength
data.value: Attribute title must have at least 3 characters.

data.name: Attribute.Title.NotEmpty
data.value: Attribute title could not be empty.

data.name: Category
data.value: Category

data.name: Category.Code.MaxLength
data.value: Category code must not be longer than 64 characters.

data.name: Category.Code.ExceedsMaxLength
data.value: The length of category's code exceeded the length defined in constraints: {0} digits.

data.name: Category.Code.NotEmpty
data.value: Category code could not be empty.

data.name: Category.Code.Duplicate
data.value: Category code already exists.

data.name: Category.Delete.HasItems
data.value: Category cannot be deleted because it has items.

data.name: Category.Delete.HasSubCategories
data.value: Category cannot be deleted because it has sub-categories.

data.name: Category.HasNextLevel.NotNull
data.value: Category next-level flag is required.

data.name: Category.HasNextLevel.HasSubCategories
data.value: Category cannot be marked as the last level because it has sub-categories.

data.name: Category.LevelNo.LastLevelIf6
data.value: The 6th level could not have sub-categories as children.

data.name: Category.LevelNo.NotLastLevelIf1
data.value: The very top level could not be set as the last level.

data.name: Category.LevelNo.Range
data.value: Category level number must be between 1 and 6.

data.name: Category.Ordering.Invalid
data.value: Category ordering field is not allowed: {0}.

data.name: Category.Parent.CannotHaveChildren
data.value: The selected parent category cannot have sub-categories.

data.name: Category.Parent.LevelMismatch
data.value: The selected parent category must be on level {0}, but it is on level {1}.

data.name: Category.Parent.Required
data.value: Parent category is required for categories below the first level.

data.name: Category.Parent.RootCannotHaveParent
data.value: A first-level category cannot have a parent category.

data.name: Category.Title.MaxLength
data.value: Category title must not be longer than 200 characters.

data.name: Category.Title.MinLength
data.value: Category title must have at least 3 characters.

data.name: Category.Title.NotEmpty
data.value: Category title could not be empty.

data.name: CategoryLevelConstraint
data.value: Category Level Constraint

data.name: CategoryLevelConstraint.CodeLength.CannotDecrease
data.value: Code length for level {0} cannot be reduced from {1} to {2} because categories already exist on that level.

data.name: CategoryLevelConstraint.Delete.HasCategories
data.value: Category level constraint for level {0} cannot be deleted because categories already exist on that level.

data.name: CategoryLevelConstraint.CodeLength.Range
data.value: Category level constraint code length must be between 1 and 5.

data.name: CategoryLevelConstraint.LevelNo.Duplicate
data.value: A category level constraint is already defined for level {0}.

data.name: CategoryLevelConstraint.LevelNo.PreviousRequired
data.value: Category level constraint for level {1} cannot be defined before level {0} is defined.

data.name: CategoryLevelConstraint.LevelNo.Range
data.value: Category level constraint level number must be between 1 and 6.

data.name: CK_Category_LevelNo
data.value: Level number should be between 1 and 7.

data.name: CK_Category_LevelNo_LastLevel
data.value: The very top level could not be set as the last level.

data.name: Code
data.value: Code

data.name: Id
data.value: Id

data.name: InventoryMovementType
data.value: Inventory Movement Type

data.name: IsActive
data.value: Is Active

data.name: Item
data.value: Item

data.name: ItemType
data.value: Item Type

data.name: MeasurementDimension
data.value: Measurement Dimension

data.name: No
data.value: No

data.name: RemittanceType
data.value: Remittance Type

data.name: RemittanceType.AddToStock.NotNull
data.value: Remittance type add-to-stock flag is required.

data.name: RemittanceType.Code.Duplicate
data.value: Remittance type code already exists.

data.name: RemittanceType.Code.NotEmpty
data.value: Remittance type code could not be empty.

data.name: RemittanceType.Code.Numeric
data.value: Remittance type code must be numeric.

data.name: RemittanceType.Delete.HasRelatedEntities
data.value: Remittance type cannot be deleted because related entities are attached to it.

data.name: RemittanceType.Title.MaxLength
data.value: Remittance type title must not be longer than 50 characters.

data.name: RemittanceType.Title.MinLength
data.value: Remittance type title must have at least 3 characters.

data.name: RemittanceType.Title.NotEmpty
data.value: Remittance type title could not be empty.

data.name: Receipt
data.value: Receipt

data.name: Receipt.FieldValue.ExactlyOneValue
data.value: Exactly one value must be filled for receipt field definition '{0}'.

data.name: Receipt.LineAttributeValue.ExactlyOneValue
data.value: Exactly one value must be filled for receipt item attribute '{0}'.

data.name: Receipt.LineAttributeValue.ItemAttribute.Duplicate
data.value: Receipt line contains duplicate item attribute values.

data.name: Receipt.FieldValue.DataTypeMismatch
data.value: Receipt field value does not match the configured field data type.

data.name: Receipt.FieldValue.FieldDefinition.Duplicate
data.value: Receipt contains duplicate field definition values.

data.name: Receipt.FieldValue.FieldDefinition.NotConfigured
data.value: Receipt field definition is not configured for this receipt type and placement.

data.name: Receipt.FieldValue.Required
data.value: A required receipt field value is missing.

data.name: Receipt.Number.NotEmpty
data.value: Receipt number could not be empty.

data.name: Receipt.Number.Duplicate
data.value: Receipt number already exists.

data.name: Receipt.ReceiptDate.NotEmpty
data.value: Receipt date could not be empty.

data.name: Receipt.ReceiptFieldValues.NotNull
data.value: Receipt field values are required.

data.name: Receipt.ReceiptLines.NotEmpty
data.value: Receipt must have at least one line.

data.name: Receipt.ReceiptLines.RowNumber.Duplicate
data.value: Receipt contains duplicate row number '{0}'.

data.name: Receipt.ReceiptType.NotEmpty
data.value: Receipt type could not be empty.

data.name: ReceiptFieldDefinition
data.value: Receipt Field Definition

data.name: ReceiptFieldValue.FieldDefinition.NotEmpty
data.value: Receipt field definition is required.

data.name: ReceiptLine.AttributeValues.NotNull
data.value: Receipt line attribute values are required.

data.name: ReceiptLine.FieldValues.NotNull
data.value: Receipt line field values are required.

data.name: ReceiptLine.Item.NotEmpty
data.value: Item is required.

data.name: ReceiptLine.Quantity.Positive
data.value: Quantity must be greater than zero.

data.name: ReceiptLine.UnitOfMeasurement.NotEmpty
data.value: Unit of measurement is required.

data.name: ReceiptLine.UnitOfMeasurement.NotAllowed
data.value: Receipt line unit of measurement is not allowed for the selected item.

data.name: ReceiptLineAttributeValue.ItemAttribute.NotEmpty
data.value: Item attribute is required.

data.name: ReceiptType.AddToStock.NotNull
data.value: Receipt type add-to-stock flag is required.

data.name: ReceiptType.Code.Duplicate
data.value: Receipt type code already exists.

data.name: ReceiptType.Code.NotEmpty
data.value: Receipt type code could not be empty.

data.name: ReceiptType.Code.Numeric
data.value: Receipt type code must be numeric.

data.name: ReceiptType.Delete.HasRelatedEntities
data.value: Receipt type cannot be deleted because related entities are attached to it.

data.name: ReceiptType.Title.MaxLength
data.value: Receipt type title must not be longer than 50 characters.

data.name: ReceiptType.Title.MinLength
data.value: Receipt type title must have at least 3 characters.

data.name: ReceiptType.Title.NotEmpty
data.value: Receipt type title could not be empty.

data.name: ReceiptTypeFieldConfiguration
data.value: Receipt Type Field Configuration

data.name: ReceiptTypeFieldConfiguration.Exists.NotNull
data.value: Receipt type field configuration exists flag is required.

data.name: ReceiptTypeFieldConfiguration.FieldDefinition.NotEmpty
data.value: Receipt field definition is required.

data.name: ReceiptTypeFieldConfiguration.IsRequired.ExistsFalse
data.value: Receipt type field configuration cannot be required when it does not exist.

data.name: ReceiptTypeFieldConfiguration.IsRequired.NotNull
data.value: Receipt type field configuration required flag is required.

data.name: ReceiptTypeFieldConfiguration.Placement.Invalid
data.value: Receipt type field configuration placement is invalid.

data.name: ReceiptTypeFieldConfiguration.Placement.NotAllowed
data.value: Receipt type field configuration placement is not allowed for the selected field definition.

data.name: ReceiptTypeFieldConfiguration.Placement.NotNull
data.value: Receipt type field configuration placement is required.

data.name: ShippingCompany
data.value: Shipping Company

data.name: ShippingCompany.Title.MinLength
data.value: Shipping company title must have at least 3 characters.

data.name: ShippingCompany.Title.NotEmpty
data.value: Shipping company title could not be empty.

data.name: Title
data.value: Title

data.name: UnitOfMeasurement
data.value: Unit of Measurement

data.name: Warehouse
data.value: Warehouse

data.name: Warehouse.Code.Duplicate
data.value: Warehouse code already exists.

data.name: Warehouse.Code.NotEmpty
data.value: Warehouse code could not be empty.

data.name: Warehouse.Code.Numeric
data.value: Warehouse code must be numeric.

data.name: Warehouse.CompanyUnit.NotEmpty
data.value: Company unit is required.

data.name: Warehouse.Delete.HasLocations
data.value: Warehouse cannot be deleted because warehouse locations are attached to it.

data.name: Warehouse.MaxMonetaryValue.Precision
data.value: Maximum monetary value must have precision 22 and scale 4.

data.name: Warehouse.Title.MaxLength
data.value: Warehouse title must not be longer than 250 characters.

data.name: Warehouse.Title.MinLength
data.value: Warehouse title must have at least 3 characters.

data.name: Warehouse.Title.NotEmpty
data.value: Warehouse title could not be empty.

data.name: Warehouse.Type.NotEmpty
data.value: Warehouse type is required.

data.name: WarehouseLocation
data.value: Warehouse Location

data.name: WarehouseLocation.Code.Duplicate
data.value: Warehouse location code already exists.

data.name: WarehouseLocation.Code.NotEmpty
data.value: Warehouse location code could not be empty.

data.name: WarehouseLocation.Code.Numeric
data.value: Warehouse location code must be numeric.

data.name: WarehouseLocation.Delete.HasChildren
data.value: Warehouse location cannot be deleted because child locations are attached to it.

data.name: WarehouseLocation.LevelNo.LastLevelIf6
data.value: The 6th level warehouse location cannot have child locations.

data.name: WarehouseLocation.LevelNo.Range
data.value: Warehouse location level number must be between 1 and 6.

data.name: WarehouseLocation.Parent.NotInWarehouse
data.value: The selected parent warehouse location must belong to the same warehouse.

data.name: WarehouseLocation.Title.MaxLength
data.value: Warehouse location title must not be longer than 250 characters.

data.name: WarehouseLocation.Title.MinLength
data.value: Warehouse location title must have at least 3 characters.

data.name: WarehouseLocation.Title.NotEmpty
data.value: Warehouse location title could not be empty.

data.name: WarehouseType.Code.Duplicate
data.value: Warehouse type code already exists.

data.name: WarehouseType.Code.NotEmpty
data.value: Warehouse type code could not be empty.

data.name: WarehouseType.Delete.HasWarehouses
data.value: Warehouse type cannot be deleted because warehouses are registered with it.

data.name: WarehouseType.Title.MaxLength
data.value: Warehouse type title must not be longer than 50 characters.

data.name: WarehouseType.Title.MinLength
data.value: Warehouse type title must have at least 3 characters.

data.name: WarehouseType.Title.NotEmpty
data.value: Warehouse type title could not be empty.

data.name: WarehouseType
data.value: Warehouse Type

data.name: Yes
data.value: Yes

data.name: Attribute.Delete.CategoryAttributeRule
data.value: Attribute cannot be deleted because it has category attribute rules.

data.name: Item.Barcode.MaxLength
data.value: Item barcode must not be longer than 80 characters.

data.name: Item.Code.Duplicate
data.value: Item code already exists.

data.name: Item.Code.MaxLength
data.value: Item code must not be longer than 80 characters.

data.name: Item.Code.NotEmpty
data.value: Item code could not be empty.

data.name: Item.Delete.HasInventoryLots
data.value: Item cannot be deleted because inventory lots are attached to it.

data.name: Item.ItemUnitOfMeasurements.MaxCount
data.value: Item can have up to {0} unit of measurement relations.

data.name: Item.Sku.MaxLength
data.value: Item SKU must not be longer than 80 characters.

data.name: Item.Sku.MinLength
data.value: Item SKU must have at least 7 characters.

data.name: Item.Sku.NotEmpty
data.value: Item SKU could not be empty.

data.name: Item.TechnicalNumber.MaxLength
data.value: Item technical number must not be longer than 80 characters.

data.name: Item.Title.MaxLength
data.value: Item title must not be longer than 250 characters.

data.name: Item.Title.MinLength
data.value: Item title must have at least 3 characters.

data.name: Item.Title.NotEmpty
data.value: Item title could not be empty.

data.name: Item.TitleInEnglish.MaxLength
data.value: Item English title must not be longer than 250 characters.

data.value: Payment Date

data.name: Receipt.OrderNumber
data.value: Order Number

data.value: Shipping Cost

data.value: Warehouse Location

data.name: Receipt.Discount
data.value: Discount

data.name: Receipt.OtherCosts
data.value: Other Costs

data.name: ReceiptTypeConfiguration
data.value: Receipt Type Configuration

data.name: ReceiptTypeConfiguration.FieldConfigurations.FieldDefinition.Duplicate
data.value: Receipt type configuration contains duplicate field definitions.

data.name: ReceiptTypeConfiguration.FieldConfigurations.NotEmpty
data.value: Receipt type configuration must have at least one field configuration.

data.name: ReceiptTypeConfiguration.ReceiptType.Duplicate
data.value: Configuration already exists for this receipt type.

data.name: ReceiptTypeConfiguration.ReceiptType.NotEmpty
data.value: Receipt type could not be empty.
